steps.title: Convert to degrees
steps.content:
Multiply the radian measure by $\frac{180}{\pi}$.
$$\frac{\pi}{12}\cdot\frac{180}{\pi}=15$$
So angle $H$ measures $15^\circ$.

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content:
The angle measure is also $5n$ degrees, so solve the equation below.
$$5n=15$$
$$n=3$$
The answer is A.
